Resources

Downloadable files and resources related to olympiads, study, and research.

Olympiad Materials

International Olympiad on Astronomy and Astrophysics (IOAA)

2025 (18th)

  • Data Sheet
  • Theory Bundle
  • Data Analysis Bundle
  • Observation (Sky Map) Bundle
  • Observation (Telescope) Bundle
  • Observation (Planetarium) Bundle
  • Group Bundle

2024 (17th)

  • Theory Problems
  • Data Analysis Problems
  • Observation Problems
  • Planetarium Problems

2023 (16th)

  • Theory Problems
  • Data Analysis Problems
  • Observation Problems
  • Planetarium Problems
  • Group Problems

2022 (15th)

  • Theory Problems
  • Data Analysis Problem 1 with Solution
  • Data Analysis Problem 2 with Solution
  • Nighttime Observation Problems
  • Daytime Observation Problems

Historical Materials

  • IOAA Problem Book (2007–2021)

Chinese National Astronomy Olympiad (CNAO)

CNAO materials are primarily in Chinese. Please refer to the Chinese versions of this site for detailed content.

International Astronomy Olympiad (IAO)

2015 (20th)

  • Theory Round for Group α
  • Theory Round for Group β
  • Supplementary Material 1 for Theory Round
  • Supplementary Material 2 for Theory Round (Tab. of Const.)
  • Supplementary Material 3 for Theory Round
  • Supplementary Material 4 for Theory Round
  • Supplementary Material 5 for Theory Round (HR Diag. for Group β)
  • Practical Round for Group α
  • Practical Round for Group β
  • Supplementary Material 1 for Practical Round (Group β)
  • Observational Round (Planetarium)
  • Observational Round (Cloudy Sky)
